name: Loja (Ecuador)
description: Five horizontal stripes in proportions 2:1:2:1:2 — red, blue, yellow, blue, red from top to bottom — charged with eight white five-pointed stars arranged in a ring around the centre of the flag.
history: Loja Province was established on 25 June 1824; its capital is the city of Loja, known as Ecuador's musical capital.

features.role: eight white five-pointed stars arranged in a ring around the centre of the flag
